text: said 'you too' when the waiter said enjoy your meal. cant go back there now
if u dont use ur blinker i assume u dont wash ur hands either
pulled out a coupon at whole foods and the cashier looked at me like i committed a crime
said 'yeah' three times at the drive thru speaker and still got the wrong order
we had 58 minutes left and my team was still arguing about which key went where
i have 47 fridge magnets and zero regrets
went to the store for milk eggs and bread. came home with candles and chips
its 73 degrees and im wearing a hoodie. no i will not explain myself
ice maker broke again. buying bags of ice like some kind of caveman
my dog gets more compliments than i do and honestly fair enough
waved at someone who wasnt waving at me. moving to another country now
the guy in front of me didnt use his blinker once in a 20 min drive. sociopath behavior
my coupon expired yesterday. yesterday. i will never recover from this
the drive thru person said 'what' four times and i just gave up and said large fry
our escape room team tried to use a fire extinguisher as a clue. it was not a clue
brought back a fridge magnet from a city i was in for 2 hours. its called collecting
wrote a grocery list on my hand and then washed my hands immediately after
hoodie season is every season if youre brave enough
havent had ice in 3 weeks. room temperature water is my life now
saw a dog riding in a stroller today. he looked happier than ive ever been
accidentally hugged my boss goodbye. updating my resume as we speak
used my blinker in an empty parking lot at 2am because i have integrity
handed the cashier a coupon and she said 'oh honey' and i almost cried
ordered a number 4 at the drive thru and got a number 9. math is hard i guess
we escaped with 2 seconds left and i blacked out from the stress
my fridge magnets are holding up a grocery list i will never use
texted myself the grocery list then forgot to check my texts
bought the same hoodie in 3 colors. its not a problem its a system
landlord said the ice maker is 'on backorder.' its been 4 months
dogs dont have to do taxes. dogs have it figured out
went for a handshake when they went for a hug. we ended up doing neither
ppl who dont use blinkers also probably put milk before cereal
i organized my coupons alphabetically. not a cry for help at all
the drive thru mic crackled so bad i just said 'surprise me.' big mistake
the escape room guy said we were the worst group hes ever had. we tipped him anyway
someone judged my fridge magnet collection and i judged their bare fridge right back
forgot the one thing i actually went to the store for. classic me
wearing a hoodie in july is a personality trait not a fashion choice
ice trays feel like a punishment from the 1800s
my neighbors dog has a raincoat. a raincoat. and i dont even own an umbrella
said 'love you bye' to my dentist on the phone. no coming back from that
if you merge without a blinker i hope your phone always dies at 23%
found a coupon in my jeans from 2019. expired but i still felt something
tried to order at the drive thru trash can. the actual speaker was 10 feet ahead
locked ourselves in the escape room lobby. the actual room hadnt even started yet
i buy fridge magnets from places ive never been. etsy is a beautiful thing
made a grocery list app. forgot to open the app at the grocery store
my hoodie has a stain on it but its my lucky hoodie so it stays
googled 'how to make ice without ice maker' at 1am. rock bottom
dogs get to nap anywhere and nobody calls them lazy. unfair system
held the door for someone who was way too far away. we both had to suffer thru it
blinker fluid is not a real thing and i will die on this hill
cashier said my coupon was for the other location. there is no other location
pulled up to the second window and they said 'we dont have a second window'
hint system said 'try looking around' bro we BEEN looking around
moved to a new apartment. first thing i set up was the fridge magnets
grocery list said 'stuff for dinner.' very helpful past me
someone complimented my hoodie and it made my whole week honestly
bought a mini ice maker. it makes 6 cubes at a time. this is my life now
a golden retriever smiled at me today and i almost cried in public
called my teacher 'mom' in college. i was 22
no blinker AND going 10 under? pick a lane. literally pick a lane
my coupon binder is color coded and i will not be taking questions
said 'no onions' at the drive thru. got extra onions. they knew what they did
we paid $35 each to feel dumb for an hour. escape rooms are a scam and i love them
ran out of fridge space for magnets. considering getting a second fridge
brought the grocery list but left it in the car. went in anyway. chaos
hoodies with thumb holes are peak human engineering
the repairman laughed at my ice maker. actually laughed
dogs dont have existential dread at 3am. must be nice
fist bumped someone going for a high five. haunts me weekly
saw someone use their blinker today. faith in humanity temporarily restored
saved 37 cents with a coupon. cashier did not share my excitement
the drive thru line was so long i finished a whole podcast episode
my friend solved the escape room puzzle by accident. she sneezed on it
my fridge magnets tell a better travel story than my instagram
remembered the grocery list halfway home. did not go back. no regrets
lost my favorite hoodie at a party. called it a crime scene
been chewing on ice from a bag like some kind of feral raccoon
every dog at the park ignored me today. even dogs dont want to hang out
accidentally said 'amen' at the end of a work meeting
bmw drivers and blinkers. name a less iconic duo. ill wait
double coupon day is my super bowl and i dont care who knows
panicked at the drive thru and ordered a kids meal. im 34
escape room had a morse code puzzle. none of us know morse code. shocking outcome
someone gave me a fridge magnet as a gift. they get me
wrote grocery list on a napkin. napkin disintegrated in the rain. poetic honestly
wearing two hoodies rn. its called layering look it up
the ice maker made one cube today. one. single. cube
saw a pug in sunglasses at target. he was living my dream life
replied 'good thanks' when no one asked how i was doing
not using ur blinker doesnt make u cool it makes u a menace karen
coupon expired while i was in line. the universe has a sick sense of humor
drove past the drive thru window because i zoned out. had to go around again
the escape room timer ran out and i was still reading the instructions on the wall
my magnets are falling off cuz the fridge is too full of magnets. beautiful problem
asked my wife to text me the grocery list. she sent a thumbs up emoji
dryer shrunk my hoodie. wearing it anyway. crop top hoodie era
told the landlord the ice maker situation is affecting my mental health. not joking
waved back at someone on a video call who was waving at someone else. muted myself
